criteria.justification: The PR description fills Summary, Spec highlights, Architecture, Testing, Governance review, and Migration notes with concrete behavior, edge cases, and outcome summaries rather than only linking the underlying docs.

The output explicitly says no deploy workflow files are changed, staging stays on normal merge automation, and production remains behind the manual approval gate in `deploy-prod.yml`, with no direct deploy trigger described anywhere.
The PR description's Migration notes section names `migrations/2026-07-10-backfill-user-role-enum.js` and explains that it must run before code removing the legacy `Role` field is deployed.
